prompt: Create a captivating fantasy-themed hero image for Luminth, an AI world-building platform, designed for a website landing page. Utilize a 16:9 aspect ratio with the central focal point adhering to the rule-of-thirds. Embrace Luminth's visual identity by incorporating a dark warm palette featuring brown-black, teal, and gold, and striking a balance between fantasy and technology. Capture an illuminated manuscript aesthetic infused with vibrant yet refined elements. On the dark background, create layered depth with magical components: a towering steampunk cityscape on the left, a serene elven forest in the center, and a fiery dragon-guarded castle on the right. Integrate gradient fade zones at the top and bottom for seamless text overlay. Utilize dynamic elements to guide the viewer's eye from left to right, maintaining balance. Position the platform’s logo in the upper third, ensuring clarity through sufficient negative space.
